title: Alibaba Cloud Qwen3.5 122B A10B now available as a Databricks-hosted model in Public Preview
body:
Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud [Qwen3.5 122B A10B](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#qwen35-122b-a10b) as a Databricks-hosted model. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis).

Qwen3.5 122B A10B is available in [Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with [applicable terms](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
